instruction: Albert wants to determine a 98 percent confidence interval for the true proportion of times he rolls a 4 (using a fair, 6-sided die). How many rolls must Albert make to get a margin of error less than or equal to.05? [To find n, use the guessed value p*=1/6 for the sample proportion and the values for z*from a z-table or t-table.] [Round to the smallest integer that works.] n=[ANS]
